title: Verify AIModelFamily per-row genotype values against real-world product facts
description: The 13 model-family entries in `AIModelFamilyOrdinalityTable` were populated with substrate-doctrine genotype values during the 2026-05-26 design conversation, but several rows carry judgment calls or `?` placeholders that need verification against current provider state. Concrete rows to verify: (1) `openai-codex` `providerHostedOverlay` — does OpenAI actually expose fine-tuning for the Codex line distinct from GPT-4? Currently set TRUE. (2) `deepseek` `providerHostedOverlay` — DeepSeek's API quietly added fine-tuning in 2025; currently set FALSE, likely needs flip. (3) `apple-foundation` `modalities.visionIn` — Apple Intelligence has image-understanding but limited; might be cleaner to set FALSE at family-level. (4) `xai-grok` `reasoningCapability` — set `providerExposedReasoning` for Grok-3 thinking; verify against current Grok-3 API. (5) `cohere` `trainingDataProvenance` — set `declared`; check whether Cohere has audited-clean claim now. (6) `amazon-nova` `providerHostedOverlay` — set FALSE; verify whether Bedrock Nova fine-tuning has shipped. Once verified, update the entry values in `AIModelFamilyOrdinalityTable.swift` and update any failing doctrine tests in `AIModelFamilyDoctrineTests.swift`.
